meta_title: Custom Railings & Balustrades | Vyomika Atelier LLP
meta_description: Glass, fabricated, per-step baluster and wrought iron railings for indoor and exterior staircases — straight, L-shape, U-shape, curved and custom layouts. Request a quotation from Vyomika Atelier LLP.

hero.label: Railings
hero.title: Railings & Balustrades
hero.subtitle: Precision-fabricated stair railings, glass balustrades and bespoke metal guards — engineered for Indian residences, hospitality and commercial projects.

intro.title: Metalwork That Defines the Staircase
intro.body: From frameless glass with stainless posts to forged wrought iron and CNC-fabricated balusters, Vyomika Atelier LLP designs, fabricates and delivers railing systems that meet IS safety expectations while elevating your interior or façade.

categories.title: Railing Categories
categories.subtitle: Six core systems we fabricate and install across Mumbai, Pune, Bangalore, Delhi NCR and Pan-India projects.

items.title: Glass Railings
items.text: Toughened glass panels with stainless or black PVD posts and top rails — ideal for modern staircases and balconies with uninterrupted views.

items.title: Fabricated Railings
items.text: Custom stainless or mild-steel sections — flat bar, tube and plate assemblies CNC-cut and welded in our Delhi studio.

items.title: Per-Step Baluster Railings
items.text: Individual balusters anchored per tread — classic for heritage homes, duplexes and grand entrance stairs.

items.title: Wrought Iron Railings
items.text: Scrollwork, pickets and hammered details with durable powder-coat or patina finishes for villas and boutique hotels.

items.title: Indoor Railings
items.text: Low-profile profiles, PVD champagne or matte black finishes, and concealed fixings suited to apartments and offices.

items.title: Exterior Railings
items.text: Weather-resistant grades, drainage detailing and corrosion-resistant coatings for terraces, ramps and outdoor stairs.

layouts.title: Staircase & Layout Shapes
layouts.subtitle: We template, fabricate and install for common and complex geometries.

items.title: Straight
items.text: Single-run stairs — fastest to template and install.

items.title: L-Shape
items.text: Quarter-turn with landing — custom post angles and glass mitres.

items.title: U-Shape
items.text: Half-turn or dog-leg configurations with continuous handrail options.

items.title: Cutout
items.text: Stairs wrapping a lift core or void — precision site measurement essential.

items.title: Curved
items.text: Helical or sweeping curves — segmented glass or bent metal rails.

items.title: Custom
items.text: Split-level, floating treads or architect-drawn one-offs — share DWG/PDF drawings.

why.title: Why Specify Vyomika Atelier
items: Site measurement and shop drawings before fabrication
Grade 304/316 stainless, toughened glass and IS-aligned guard heights
PVD, powder-coat and brushed finishes to match doors and partitions
Delhi studio QC with labelled crating for safe Pan-India delivery
Coordination with your contractor or architect on site
